rationale: The citing paper mentions Van Heerde, Leeflang, and Wittink (2001) only once, in a grouped citation, to support the general point that price interactions with feature/display can be important. This is used as background for a stated limitation of the citing model, not as a core input to its structural demand-supply framework or estimation. The paper does not adopt the cited paper's semiparametric deal-effect method or build its contribution around that work.
